sfui:UIVisualContainer.name: __ROOT_ELEMENT__
sfui:UIVisualContainer.style: position: absolute; flex-direction: column; width: 100%; height: 100%;

sfui:UIVisualContainer.name: Container 1
sfui:UIVisualContainer.style: flex-direction: row; background-color: (255,0,0,127); border-color: (255,0,0,191); border-width: 5; border-radius: 20; origin-x: 50%; origin-y: 100%;

sfui:UIImage.style: position: relative; background-color: (255,255,255,127); border-color: (255,255,255,255); border-width: 3; border-radius: 10; origin-x: 50%; origin-y: 50%; image-smooth: smooth; image-path: 'kirbo_sunset_wallpaper.png'; image-width: 100%;image-height: 100%; image-position-x: center; image-position-y: bottom; image-position-y-offset:100%; image-scale-mode: scale-to-fit;
